title: Spain vs Italy
shortAnswer: Italy has a larger economy and military but higher deficits, while Spain shows more balanced fiscal management despite smaller overall size.
prosA: Lower government deficit indicating better fiscal discipline
Strong paramilitary and reserve forces for homeland security
More efficient government spending relative to GDP
Better debt management with lower deficit ratios
consA: Smaller overall economy and lower GDP per capita
Lower absolute spending on key sectors like education and health
prosB: Larger economy with higher GDP and per capita income
Substantially larger military with more active personnel
Higher absolute investment in education, health, and defense
Greater overall government capacity and resources
consB: Much higher government deficit creating fiscal pressure
Less efficient fiscal management relative to size
Higher debt burden and financial obligations
verdict: Italy leads in economic size, military capacity, and public spending but struggles with fiscal deficits. Spain demonstrates superior fiscal discipline and efficient resource management despite being smaller overall.
